---
title: "test_bootstrap"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_bootstrap.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_shape` {#test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_shape}

```python
def test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_shape()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L12){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_mean` {#test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_mean}

```python
def test_uncorrelated_confs_to_bts_mean()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L19){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_bootstrap_samples_error_blocks_numpy_mean` {#test_bootstrap_samples_error_blocks_numpy_mean}

```python
def test_bootstrap_samples_error_blocks_numpy_mean()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L34){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_parametric_gaussian_bts` {#test_parametric_gaussian_bts}

```python
def test_parametric_gaussian_bts()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L42){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_binning` {#test_binning}

```python
def test_binning()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L51){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_bootstrap_bias` {#test_bootstrap_bias}

```python
def test_bootstrap_bias()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_bootstrap.py#L58){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
